content:textarea:6:34.name: Paragraph
content:textarea:6:34.html: If you’re looking for a way to directly support the individuals and families staying at our shelter, we’ve compiled a list of needs below. These are some of the most helpful donations at this time — though it’s not a complete list, it reflects our most pressing needs and is updated monthly.

  • Juice boxes or pouches
  • Individually wrapped snacks (granola bars, crackers, fruit snacks, etc.)
  • Craft & art supplies
  • Size 5 Diapers
  • Large Ladies Bras
  • Brushes & combs
